title: The 7 Worst Stocks to Buy in a Bear Market
text: The worst stocks to buy in a bear market tend to be those that were overvalued to begin with. It's been a year to forget for equity investors.

title: Here are 3 Stocks That Benefit From a Strong U.S. Dollar
text: A strong U.S. dollar results in more buying power for U.S. importers and U.S. tourists buying products overseas. However, it's bad news for U.S. companies

title: Is This High-Yielding Dividend Stock a Buy?
text: Darden Restaurants offers income investors a near 4% dividend yield.
